rules.name: Low Cohesion
rules.comment: Suppressed 2026-07-15. ber.rs is a hand-written BER codec whose encoder (BerWriter + encode_* helpers) and decoder (BerReader + decode_* helpers) are mutually-defining halves of one wire format; several tests assert encode->decode round-trip identity. Keeping both halves and their round-trip tests co-located in one module is a deliberate design choice that outweighs the LCOM4 cohesion signal.
